shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Rain Showers
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers between 4am and 5am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy. Low around 34, with temperatures rising to around 42 overnight. Southeast wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
